case_title: ON24, INC. VS. SPECTRACELL LABORATORIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-30-2024 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 73498422) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 73498422) TO PLAINTIFF ON24, INC.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73498422) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPECTRACELL LABORATORIES, INC. NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-30-2024 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-26-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-07-2024

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-04-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-18-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75121233)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-04-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
